meta.description: Delivery plan for a Detailed Design — one instance per design.

tickets.description: UUIDs of Ticket items in the delivery plan.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_43f9c32b_176a_49af_833a_998582ea00d3" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "tickets" UUID[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "sequencing_notes" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_43f9c32b_176a_49af_833a_998582ea00d3" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_43f9c32b176a49af_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
